R01 resubmission notes

Reviewer 1 liked the preliminary data but wanted more single-cell resolution.
Reviewer 2 had issues with the power analysis — our n was too small for
the interaction effects we were claiming.
Reviewer 3 was completely off base and asked for experiments unrelated to
the specific aims. Advisor says to ignore most of that reviewer.

Resubmission plan:
- Add the March 2026 perturb-seq pilot as new preliminary data.
- Redo the power analysis with the corrected effect sizes.
- Tighten aim 2 so reviewer 3 has less surface area to attack.
